data.name: AfterTaskSelection_Field
data.value: Eftir aรฐ verkefni lรฝkur:

data.name: AfterTaskSelection_Help
data.value: Ef รพรบ velur eitthvaรฐ annaรฐ en 'gera ekkert' mun forritiรฐ stilla stรฝrikerfiรฐ til aรฐ sรฝna รพรฉr skรฝrslu viรฐ nรฆstu innskrรกningu รพรญna รญ kerfiรฐ ef einhverjar villur eรฐa viรฐvaranir verรฐa skrรกรฐar.

data.name: Application_NewVersion_Notification
data.value: Nรฝ {0} รบtgรกfa er tiltรฆk.

data.name: BackupVersion_Delete_Confirm
data.value:
Viltu virkilega eyรฐa รบtgรกfu "{0}"?
Breytingar รก eyddri รบtgรกfu verรฐa hluti af รบtgรกfu "{1}".

data.name: BackupVersion_Storage_TitleWithSize
data.value: (allar รบtgรกfur taka {0} รก geymslu)

data.name: BackupVersion_Viewer_Help
data.value: Veldu skrรก eรฐa mรถppu sem รพรบ vilt endurheimta รญ trรฉnu og smelltu รก "Endurheimta".

data.name: BUtilServer_Error_ConnectionAborted
data.value: Tenging viรฐ รพjรณn rofnaรฐi รณvรฆnt (Eru lykilorรฐ รก biรฐlara og รพjรณni รพau sรถmu?)

data.name: CommandLineArguments_Help
data.value: Heimsรฆktu {0} til aรฐ sjรก skipanalรญnuviรฐfรถng.

data.name: DataStorage_Data_Saving
data.value: Skrifa gรถgn รญ geymslu

data.name: DataStorage_Field_DisconnectionScript_Ok
data.value: Lauk รกn vandkvรฆรฐa

data.name: DataStorage_Field_UploadQuota_Help
data.value: Takmarkar magn gagna sem send eru รก geymslu รญ einni keyrslu verkefnis. 0 - engin takmรถrk. รegar kvรณti er yfirfullur verรฐur รถรฐrum skrรกm sleppt og รพรฆr verรฐa unnar nรฆst. Notkunardรฆmi: รรบ afritar gรถgn รก fjarlรฆgan รพjรณn. Vandamรกl er: Netรพjรณnustan lรฆkkar upphleรฐsluhraรฐa eftir nokkur gรญgabรฆti. รessi stilling gerir รพรฉr kleift aรฐ takast รก viรฐ รพaรฐ.

data.name: DataStorage_Field_UploadQuota_Validation
data.value: Kvรณti รก aรฐ vera 0 (ekki beita) eรฐa gildi yfir 0.

data.name: DataStorage_Script_Help
data.value: Ef mappa verรฐur tiltรฆk eftir keyrslu skipana, tilgreindu {0} skriftur fyrir tengingu og aftengingu.

data.name: DataStorage_State_Get
data.value: Sรฆkja stรถรฐu geymslu

data.name: DurationMinutes_Field
data.value: Tรญmalengd (mรญnรบtur, 0 - รณendanlegt):

data.name: File_LastWriteTime_Min_Field
data.value: Vinna รบr skrรกm eldri en:

data.name: FtpsServerStartTask_Name
data.value: Rรฆsa FTPS รพjรณn

data.name: FtpsServerTask_Create
data.value: Deila mรถppu yfir net (FTPS รพjรณnn)

data.name: FtpsServerTask_Help
data.value: รรบ getur deilt hvaรฐa mรถppu sem er meรฐ les- og skrifaรฐgangi รญ gegnum FTPS samskiptareglu (beinlรญnis dulkรณรฐun meรฐ sjรกlfundirrituรฐu vottorรฐi) รก staรฐarnetinu รพรญnu.

data.name: Icons_Help_Link
data.value: Bรฆta stafatรกkni viรฐ textann รพinn

data.name: ImportMediaTask_Field_TransformFileName_Example
data.value: Dรฆmi: รmyndaรฐu รพรฉr aรฐ รพรบ hafir skrรกna {0} (breytt {1}). Meรฐ รพessari mรถppu og sniรฐstreng verรฐur skrรกin vistuรฐ sem: {2}

data.name: ImportMediaTask_Field_TransformFileName_Help
data.value: Studd tรณken: {DATE:Format} - Setur inn breytingardagsetningu skrรกar รก tilgreindu sniรฐi. Til aรฐ sjรก alla valkosti, leitaรฐu aรฐ "C# DateTime format".

data.name: ImportMediaTask_Field_TransformFileName_Validation_Invalid
data.value: รgild umbreyting รก skrรกarnafni.

data.name: ImportMediaTask_Help
data.value:
Flytur inn hljรณรฐskrรกr, myndir, myndbรถnd af SD-korti myndavรฉlar, upptรถkutรฆkis; myndir og myndbรถnd af sรญmanum รพรญnum รญ gegnum WI-FI meรฐ FTP-รพjรณnsforritinu meรฐ sniรฐskrรกarnรถfnum.
Sjรก vefsรญรฐu forritsins fyrir leiรฐbeiningar um hvernig รก aรฐ setja upp skrรกaflutning รญ gegnum WI-FI meรฐ FTP-รพjรณnsforritinu รก sรญmanum.

data.name: ImportMediaTask_SkipAlreadyImportedFiles
data.value: Sleppa รพegar innfluttum skrรกm

data.name: ImproveIt_Message
data.value:
รvรฆnt villa kom upp.
Vinsamlegast hafรฐu samband viรฐ รพrรณunaraรฐila meรฐ upplรฝsingarnar sem vistaรฐar eru รก skjรกborรฐinu รพรญnu รญ "{0}"
Forritiรฐ mun nรบ lokast.

data.name: IncrementalBackup_Help
data.value:
Grunnform stigvaxandi รถryggisafrits felst รญ aรฐ bera kennsl รก, skrรก og รพar af leiรฐandi varรฐveita aรฐeins รพรฆr skrรกr sem hafa breyst sรญรฐan sรญรฐasta รถryggisafrit.
รar sem breytingar eru yfirleitt litlar, eru stigvaxandi รถryggisafrit mun minni og hraรฐvirkari en full รถryggisafrit.
Til dรฆmis, eftir fullt รถryggisafrit รก fรถstudegi mun รถryggisafrit รก mรกnudegi aรฐeins innihalda รพรฆr skrรกr sem breyttust sรญรฐan รก fรถstudegi. รryggisafrit รก รพriรฐjudegi inniheldur aรฐeins รพรฆr skrรกr sem breyttust sรญรฐan รก mรกnudegi, og svo framvegis.
Ef eitthvert afritanna sem bรบiรฐ er til mistekst, รพ.m.t. รพaรฐ fyrsta (fulla), verรฐur endurheimt รณfullnรฆgjandi.

data.name: Installer_AdminRequired
data.value: Stjรณrnandaheimildir eru nauรฐsynlegar til aรฐ setja upp fyrir alla notendur. Vinsamlegast keyrรฐu uppsetningarforritiรฐ sem stjรณrnandi eรฐa notaรฐu /CURRENTUSER.

data.name: Installer_AdminRequiredDetailed
data.value:
Stjรณrnandaheimildir eru nauรฐsynlegar til aรฐ setja upp fyrir alla notendur.
Vinsamlegast annaรฐhvort: - Veldu 'Setja upp eingรถngu fyrir nรบverandi notanda', eรฐa - Keyrรฐu รพetta uppsetningarforrit sem stjรณrnandi

data.name: Installer_AllUsersDescription
data.value: Forritiรฐ verรฐur tiltรฆkt fyrir alla notendur รก รพessari tรถlvu.

data.name: Installer_AllUsersOption
data.value: Setja upp fyrir &alla notendur (krefst stjรณrnandaheimilda)

data.name: Installer_ArchRequired
data.value: รetta uppsetningarforrit krefst x64 eรฐa arm64 รบtgรกfu af Windows.

data.name: Installer_CurrentUserDescription
data.value: Rรกรฐlagt. Forritiรฐ verรฐur aรฐeins tiltรฆkt fyrir รพinn notandareikning.

data.name: Installer_CurrentUserOption
data.value: Setja upp eingรถngu fyrir &nรบverandi notanda

data.name: Installer_InstallModeDescription
data.value: Vinsamlegast veldu hvort รพรบ vilt setja upp BUtil aรฐeins fyrir รพig eรฐa alla notendur รพessarar tรถlvu.

data.name: Installer_InstallModeSubtitle
data.value: Veldu hverjir geta notaรฐ รพetta forrit

data.name: LeftMenu_What_Hint
data.value: Hรฉr getur รพรบ bรฆtt viรฐ mรถppum og skrรกm sem รพรบ รพarft aรฐ vinna รบr.

data.name: LeftMenu_What_Validation
data.value: Engin atriรฐi til aรฐ vinna รบr.

data.name: LeftMenu_When_Help
data.value: Hรฉr getur รพรบ sett upp tรญmaรกรฆtlun. Tรญmaรกรฆtlun getur hjรกlpaรฐ รพรฉr aรฐ sjรกlfvirknivรฆรฐa keyrslu verkefna.

data.name: LeftMenu_Where_Help_DragDrop
data.value: Dragรฐu og slepptu skrรกm og mรถppum hingaรฐ รบr Explorer.

data.name: LeftMenu_Where_Hint
data.value: Hรฉr getur รพรบ bรฆtt viรฐ staรฐsetningum รพar sem รพรบ vilt aรฐ skrรกrnar รพรญnar verรฐi afritaรฐar.

data.name: Local_State_Get
data.value: Sรฆkja staรฐbundna stรถรฐu

data.name: Local_State_Saving
data.value: Skrifa staรฐbundna stรถรฐu

data.name: Name_Field_Validation
data.value: Heiti er autt eรฐa inniheldur รณstudd slรณรฐarmerki.

data.name: Name_Field_Validation_ExceedsLimit
data.value: Lengd nafns '{0}' fer yfir mรถrk um {1} stafi.

data.name: Name_Field_Validation_Duplicate
data.value: Verk meรฐ รพessu heiti er รพegar til.

data.name: Password_Help
data.value: Rรกรฐlรถgรฐ lรกgmarkslengd lykilorรฐs er 50 stafir eรฐa fleiri.

data.name: RestoreFrom_Field_Validation_NoStateFiles
data.value:
Finn ekki skrรกr "{0}" รญ mรถppu.
Bentu รก mรถppu sem inniheldur รพessa skrรก.

data.name: RestoreFrom_Field_Validation_StateInvalid
data.value: Ekki er hรฆgt aรฐ lesa stรถรฐu.

data.name: Server_Field_Address_Validation
data.value: Heiti รพjรณns er ekki tilgreint.

data.name: SFTP_Validation_PasswordAndKeyNotSpecified
data.value: Bรฆรฐi lykilorรฐ og lyklaskrรก eru auรฐ.

data.name: SFTPFolder_Field_Validation_InvalidPostfix
data.value: SFTP mappa mรก ekki enda รก /.

data.name: SFTPFolder_Field_Validation_InvalidPrefix
data.value: SFTP mappa verรฐur aรฐ byrja รก /.

data.name: SFTPFolder_Field_Validation_RootFolder
data.value: SFTP mappa / er ekki leyfรฐ. Mappa verรฐur aรฐ vรญsa รก nรกkvรฆmari mรถppu.

data.name: SourceItem_AddFolders
data.value: Bรฆta viรฐ mรถppum...

data.name: SourceItem_State_Get
data.value: Sรฆkja stรถรฐu upprunaatriรฐis "{0}"

data.name: SourceItem_Validation_Empty
data.value: Engin atriรฐi til aรฐ vinna รบr.

data.name: State_File_Get
data.value: Sรฆkja stรถรฐu skrรกar "{0}"

data.name: State_LoadFromEverywhere
data.value: Sรฆkja stรถรฐu upprunaatriรฐa og geymslna

data.name: StorageItem_ExcludePattern_Add
data.value: Bรฆta viรฐ รบtilokunarmynstri skrรกa

data.name: StorageItem_ExcludePattern_GlobbingNetPatterns
data.value: Skrรกa globbing รญ .NET: Mynstur

data.name: StorageItem_ExcludePattern_Help
data.value: Hรฉr getur รพรบ tilgreint รบtilokunarmynstur skrรกa. รaรฐ getur veriรฐ skrรกarheiti eรฐa mรถppuheiti eรฐa algildistรกkn. Dรฆmi: d:\temp, d:\temp\file.txt, d:\temp\**\*.txt eรฐa bin. Sjรก nรกkvรฆma lรฝsingu รก eftirfarandi tengli.

data.name: StorageItem_ExcludePattern_Hint
data.value: Sleppir vinnslu skrรกa eftir รบtilokunarmynstri.

data.name: SynchronizationTask_Help
data.value: Tvรญรกtta samstilling skrรกa milli tรฆkja meรฐ miรฐlรฆgri geymslu.

data.name: Task_Create_Hint
data.value: Bรฝr til nรฝtt verkefni.

data.name: Task_Edit_Validation_NoCLI
data.value: รรบ getur ekki breytt รพessari tegund verkefnis รญ CLI.

data.name: Task_OpenLog
data.value: Opna sรญรฐustu atvikaskrรก

data.name: Task_Status_FailedSeeLog
data.value: Mistรณkst (sjรก opna atvikaskrรก)

data.name: Task_Status_PartialDueToQuota
data.value: Lokiรฐ aรฐ hluta. Vegna geymslumarka voru sumar skrรกr sleppt รญ รพetta skipti. Eftir eru {0} skrรกr meรฐ {1} GB.

data.name: Task_Validation_NotSupported
data.value: รessi tegund verkefnis er ekki studd.

data.name: TechnicalTool_Error_PasswordRequired
data.value: Slรกรฐu inn lykilorรฐ.

data.name: TechnicalTool_Error_PathRequired
data.value: Tilgreindu bรฆรฐi upprunaskrรก og รบttaksskrรก.

data.name: TimeoutTask_Title
data.value: Bรญรฐ eftir tรญmamรถrkum...

data.name: TrustDetected_CertificateParseWarning
data.value: Viรฐvรถrun viรฐ greiningu vottorรฐs: {0}

data.name: TrustDetected_Ftps_Instruction
data.value: Staรฐfestu auรฐkenni vottorรฐs utan rรกsarinnar, smelltu sรญรฐan รก Vista aftur til aรฐ geyma รพaรฐ.

data.name: TrustDetected_Ftps_Title
data.value: FTPS รพjรณnsvottorรฐ greindist viรฐ prรณfun.

data.name: TrustDetected_ParsedCertificate_Header
data.value: Greindar upplรฝsingar um vottorรฐ:

data.name: TrustDetected_Sftp_Instruction
data.value: Staรฐfestu รพetta fingrafar utan rรกsarinnar, smelltu sรญรฐan รก Vista aftur til aรฐ geyma รพaรฐ.

data.name: TrustDetected_Sftp_Title
data.value: Trรบnaรฐarupplรฝsingar SFTP รพjรณns greindust viรฐ prรณfun.

data.name: UploadFolderContentsTask_Create
data.value: Hlaรฐa mรถppu รก รพjรณn

data.name: UploadFolderTask_Help
data.value: รรบ getur hlaรฐiรฐ upp innihaldi mรถppu og skrifaรฐ yfir skrรกr sem รพegar eru til.

data.name: S3_Provider_AlibabaCloudOSS_Help
data.value:
Fjarvistarsรถnnun Cloud OSS โ S3-samhรฆft hlutgeymsla frรก Alibaba.
1. ร OSS Console (https://oss.console.aliyun.com/), bรบรฐu til fรถtu. Athugaรฐu svรฆรฐi รพess (t.d. oss-cn-hangzhou). 2. ร RAM Console โ Notendur โ bรบรฐu til notanda โ hengja AliyunOSSFullAccess โ bรบรฐu til AccessKey. Afritaรฐu AccessKey ID (= Access Key) og AccessKey Secret (= Secret Key). 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: https://oss-<REGION>.aliyuncs.com (t.d. https://oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com). 4. Svรฆรฐi: t.d. oss-cn-hangzhou.

data.name: S3_Provider_AWSS3_Help
data.value:
AWS S3 โ Upprunaleg hlutageymsla Amazon.
1. Opnaรฐu S3 stjรณrnborรฐiรฐ (https://s3.console.aws.amazon.com/) og bรบรฐu til fรถtu. Athugaรฐu svรฆรฐi รพess (t.d. us-east-1). 2. Opnaรฐu IAM โ Notendur โ bรบรฐu til notanda โ hengdu viรฐ AmazonS3FullAccess stefnuna. 3. Undir รryggisskilrรญki, bรบรฐu til aรฐgangslykil โ afritaรฐu lykilauรฐkenni og leyndarmรกl. 4. Fylltu รบt: Bucket, Access Key, Secret Key og Region.

data.name: S3_Provider_BaiduCloudBOS_Help
data.value:
Baidu Cloud BOS โ S3-samhรฆft hlutgeymsla frรก Baidu.
1. Bรบรฐu til fรถtu รญ BOS Console (https://console.bce.baidu.com/bos/). Athugaรฐu svรฆรฐi รพess (t.d. bj, gz, su). 2. Farรฐu รญ รryggi โ Aรฐgangslyklar โ afritaรฐu auรฐkenni aรฐgangslykilsins og leynilega aรฐgangslykilsins. 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: https://s3.<REGION>.bcebos.com (t.d. https://s3.bj.bcebos.com). 4. Svรฆรฐi: t.d. bj.

data.name: S3_Provider_BackblazeB2_Help
data.value:
Backblaze B2 โ hagkvรฆm S3-samhรฆf geymsla.
1. ร Backblaze (https://www.backblaze.com/) โ B2 Cloud Storage โ Buckets, bรบรฐu til fรถtu. 2. Farรฐu รญ forritalykla โ Bรฆta viรฐ nรฝjum forritalykli, settu hann รญ fรถtuna. Afritaรฐu lykilauรฐkenni (= aรฐgangslykill) og forritslykill (= leynilykill). 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: endapunktur fรถtu รพinnar sรฝndur รญ upplรฝsingum um fรถtu, t.d. https://s3.us-west-004.backblazeb2.com 4. Svรฆรฐi: hluti รก milli 's3.' og '.backblazeb2.com', t.d. okkur-vestur-004.

data.name: S3_Provider_CloudflareR2_Help
data.value:
Cloudflare R2 โ S3-samhรฆf geymsla meรฐ nรบllรบtgangi.
1. ร Cloudflare mรฆlaborรฐinu (https://dash.cloudflare.com/) โ R2 โ bรบรฐu til fรถtu. 2. Farรฐu รญ R2 โ Stjรณrna R2 API tรกknum โ Bรบa til API tรกkn meรฐ Lesa og skrifa hlut. Afritaรฐu auรฐkenni aรฐgangslykils og leynilega aรฐgangslykil. 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: https://<ACCOUNT_ID>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com Reikningsauรฐkenni รพitt er sรฝnt รก R2 yfirlitssรญรฐunni. 4. Fylltu รบt: Bucket, Access Key, Secret Key og Service URL. Svรฆรฐi er sjรกlfkrafa stillt รก 'sjรกlfvirkt'.

data.name: S3_Provider_CloudRuStorage_Help
data.value:
Cloud.ru (SberCloud) Object Storage โ S3-samhรฆfรฐ OBS geymsla.
1. ร Cloud.ru Console (https://cloud.ru/) โ Object Storage Service (OBS) โ bรบรฐu til fรถtu. 2. Farรฐu รญ Skilrรญkin mรญn โ Aรฐgangslyklar โ Bรฆta viรฐ aรฐgangslykli. Afritaรฐu aรฐgangslykilinn og leynilega aรฐgangslykilinn. 3. Fylltu รบt: Bucket, Access Key, Secret Key og Region (t.d. ru-moscow-1). รjรณnustuslรณรฐ er fyllt รบt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: S3_Provider_Custom_Help
data.value:
MinIO eรฐa hvaรฐa S3-samhรฆfรฐan netรพjรณn sem er.
1. Rรฆstu MinIO (eรฐa annan S3-samhรฆfรฐan) netรพjรณninn รพinn. 2. Bรบรฐu til fรถtu รญ gegnum MinIO stjรณrnborรฐiรฐ eรฐa 'mc mb <alias>/<bucket>'. 3. Bรบรฐu til aรฐgangslykil รญ MinIO Console โ Aรฐgangslyklar (forรฐastu rรณtarskilrรญki รญ framleiรฐslu). 4. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: endapunktur รพjรณnsins รพรญns, t.d. http://192.168.1.10:9000 eรฐa https://minio.example.com. 5. Svรฆรฐi: hvaรฐa gildi sem er (t.d. us-east-1) โ eรฐa skildu eftir autt ef รพjรณnninn framfylgir รพvรญ ekki.

data.name: S3_Provider_DigitalOceanSpaces_Help
data.value:
DigitalOcean Spaces โ S3-samhรฆft hlutgeymsla.
1. Bรบรฐu til svรฆรฐi รญ Spaces (https://cloud.digitalocean.com/spaces). Athugaรฐu svรฆรฐi รพess (t.d. nyc3). 2. Farรฐu รญ API โ Spaces Keys โ Bรบa til nรฝjan lykil. Afritaรฐu lykilinn (= aรฐgangslykill) og leyndarmรกl. 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: https://<REGION>.digitaloceanspaces.com (t.d. https://nyc3.digitaloceanspaces.com). 4. Svรฆรฐi: sami stuttkรณรฐi, t.d. nyc3.

data.name: S3_Provider_GoogleCloudStorage_Help
data.value:
Google Cloud Storage โ รญ gegnum S3 samvirkni API.
1. Bรบรฐu til fรถtu รญ Google Cloud Console (https://console.cloud.google.com/storage). 2. Farรฐu รญ Cloud Storage โ Stillingar โ Samvirkni โ bรบรฐu til HMAC lykil fyrir รพjรณnustureikning. Afritaรฐu aรฐgangslykilinn og leyndarmรกliรฐ. 3. Fylltu รบt: Bucket, Access Key (HMAC key), Secret Key (HMAC secret). รjรณnustuvefslรณรฐ og svรฆรฐi eru stillt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: S3_Provider_HuaweiCloudOBS_Help
data.value:
Huawei Cloud OBS โ S3-samhรฆft hlutgeymsla frรก Huawei.
1. ร OBS Console (https://console.huaweicloud.com/obs/), bรบรฐu til fรถtu. Athugaรฐu svรฆรฐi รพess (t.d. cn-norรฐur-4). 2. Farรฐu รญ Skilrรญkin mรญn โ Aรฐgangslyklar โ Bรบa til aรฐgangslykil. Afritaรฐu AK (= Access Key) og SK (= Secret Key). 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: https://obs.<REGION>.myhuaweicloud.com (t.d. https://obs.cn-north-4.myhuaweicloud.com). 4. Svรฆรฐi: t.d. cn-norรฐur-4.

data.name: S3_Provider_LinodeObjectStorage_Help
data.value:
Linode (Akamai) Object Storage โ S3-samhรฆf geymsla.
1. ร Linode Cloud Manager (https://cloud.linode.com/object-storage/buckets), bรบรฐu til fรถtu. Taktu eftir รพyrpingunni hennar. 2. Farรฐu รญ Hlutageymslu โ Aรฐgangslyklar โ Bรบรฐu til aรฐgangslykil sem nรฆr til fรถtunnar. Afritaรฐu aรฐgangslykil og leynilykil. 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: https://<CLUSTER>.linodeobjects.com (t.d. https://us-east-1.linodeobjects.com). 4. Svรฆรฐi: sami klasakรณรฐi, t.d. okkur-austur-1.

data.name: S3_Provider_QiniuCloudKodo_Help
data.value:
Qiniu Cloud Kodo - S3-samhรฆf geymsla frรก Qiniu.
1. ร Qiniu Portal (https://portal.qiniu.com/kodo/bucket), bรบรฐu til fรถtu. Athugaรฐu svรฆรฐi รพess. 2. Farรฐu รญ Persรณnulega miรฐstรถรฐ โ Lyklastjรณrnun โ afritaรฐu aรฐgangslykilinn รพinn og leynilykil. 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ eftir svรฆรฐum: Austur-Kรญna: https://s3-cn-east-1.qiniucs.com Norรฐur-Kรญna: https://s3-cn-north-1.qiniucs.com Suรฐur-Kรญna: https://s3-cn-south-1.qiniucs.com Norรฐur Amerรญka: https://s3-us-north-1.qiniucs.com 4. Svรฆรฐi: samsvarandi kรณรฐi, t.d. cn-east-1.

data.name: S3_Provider_ScalewayObjectStorage_Help
data.value:
Scaleway Object Storage โ Evrรณpsk S3-samhรฆf geymsla.
1. ร Scaleway Console (https://console.scaleway.com/object-storage/buckets), bรบรฐu til fรถtu. Athugaรฐu svรฆรฐi รพess (t.d. fr-par). 2. Farรฐu รญ IAM โ API lyklar โ Bรบa til API lykil meรฐ skrifheimildum Object Storage. Afritaรฐu aรฐgangslykil og leynilykil. 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: https://s3.<REGION>.scw.cloud (t.d. https://s3.fr-par.scw.cloud). 4. Svรฆรฐi: t.d. fr-par, nl-ams, pl-waw.

data.name: S3_Provider_SelectelStorage_Help
data.value:
Selectel Object Storage โ S3-samhรฆfรฐ rรบssnesk geymsla.
1. ร Selectel Panel (https://my.selectel.ru/) โ Cloud Storage โ bรบรฐu til gรกm (= fรถtu). 2. Undir Notendur og hlutverk skaltu bรบa til รพjรณnustunotanda meรฐ geymsluaรฐgang โ S3 lyklar โ bรบa til lyklapar. Afritaรฐu aรฐgangslykil og leynilykil. 3. Fylltu รบt: Bucket, Access Key, Secret Key. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ er fyllt รบt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: S3_Provider_TencentCloudCOS_Help
data.value:
Tencent Cloud COS โ S3-samhรฆft hlutgeymsla frรก Tencent.
1. ร COS Console (https://console.cloud.tencent.com/cos), bรบรฐu til fรถtu. Athugaรฐu AppId og Region (t.d. ap-beijing). 2. ร Access Management โ API Keys โ Create Key. Afritaรฐu SecretId (= Aรฐgangslykill) og SecretKey (= Secret Key). 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: https://cos.<REGION>.myqcloud.com (t.d. https://cos.ap-beijing.myqcloud.com). 4. Sniรฐ fyrir heiti fรถtu: <nafn>-<AppId> (t.d. mybucket-1250000000). Svรฆรฐi: t.d. ap-beijing.

data.name: S3_Provider_VKCloudStorage_Help
data.value:
VK Cloud Object Storage โ S3-samhรฆf geymsla frรก VK Cloud.
1. ร VK Cloud Portal (https://msk.cloud.vk.com/) โ Cloud Storage โ bรบรฐu til fรถtu. 2. Undir reikningnum รพรญnum โ Aรฐgangslyklar โ bรบรฐu til nรฝtt lyklapar. Afritaรฐu aรฐgangslykil og leynilykil. 3. Fylltu รบt: Bucket, Access Key, Secret Key, og Region ef รพess er krafist (t.d. ru-msk). รjรณnustuslรณรฐ er fyllt รบt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: S3_Provider_VolcanoEngineTOS_Help
data.value:
Volcano Engine TOS (ByteDance) โ S3-samhรฆf geymsla.
1. Bรบรฐu til fรถtu รญ Volcano Engine Console (https://console.volcengine.com/tos). Athugaรฐu svรฆรฐi รพess (t.d. cn-beijing). 2. Farรฐu รญ IAM โ Aรฐgangslyklar โ bรบรฐu til lykil. Afritaรฐu auรฐkenni aรฐgangslykils og leynilega aรฐgangslykil. 3. รjรณnustuslรณรฐ: https://tos-s3-<REGION>.volces.com (t.d. https://tos-s3-cn-beijing.volces.com). 4. Svรฆรฐi: t.d. cn-beijing.

data.name: S3_Provider_Wasabi_Help
data.value:
Wasabi - heit skรฝgeymsla รกn รบtgรถngugjalda.
1. ร Wasabi Console (https://console.wasabisys.com/) โ Buckets โ Create Bucket. Veldu svรฆรฐi. 2. Farรฐu รญ Aรฐgangslyklar โ Bรบa til nรฝjan aรฐgangslykil. Afritaรฐu aรฐgangslykil og leynilykil. 3. Fylltu รบt: Bucket, Access Key, Secret Key og Region (t.d. us-east-1, eu-central-1). รjรณnustuslรณรฐ er fyllt รบt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: S3_Provider_YandexObjectStorage_Help
data.value:
Yandex Object Storage โ S3-samhรฆf rรบssnesk skรฝgeymsla.
1. ร Yandex Cloud Console (https://console.yandex.cloud/) โ Object Storage โ bรบรฐu til fรถtu. 2. Farรฐu รญ รjรณnustureikningar โ bรบรฐu til einn meรฐ storage.editor hlutverkinu โ bรบรฐu til Static aรฐgangslykil. Afritaรฐu lykilauรฐkenni (= aรฐgangslykill) og leynilykil. 3. Fylltu รบt: Bucket, Access Key, Secret Key. รjรณnustuvefslรณรฐ og svรฆรฐi eru stillt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: WebDav_Preset_Box_Help
data.value:
Box โ skรฝjageymsla fyrirtรฆkja meรฐ WebDAV stuรฐningi.
1. Skrรกรฐu รพig inn รก app.box.com. Athugaรฐu aรฐ Box WebDAV er aรฐeins fรกanlegt fyrir greiddar รกรฆtlanir. 2. Slรกรฐu inn Box reikningsnetfangiรฐ รพitt sem notandi. 3. Slรกรฐu inn lykilorรฐ fyrir Box sem lykilorรฐ. Ef รพรบ notar SSO gรฆtirรฐu รพurft aรฐ stilla sรฉrstakt WebDAV lykilorรฐ รญ reikningsstillingum. Netfang netรพjรณns, HTTPS, gรกtt og grunnslรณรฐ eru stillt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: WebDav_Preset_Custom_Help
data.value:
Almennur WebDAV netรพjรณnn (Nextcloud, ownCloud, Synology DSM, Seafile, Apache osfrv.)
1. Slรกรฐu inn heimilisfang netรพjรณnsins, veldu HTTPS (mรฆlt meรฐ) og stilltu gรกttina (0 = sjรกlfgefiรฐ: 80 fyrir HTTP, 443 fyrir HTTPS). 2. Slรกรฐu inn grunnslรณรฐ fyrir WebDAV endapunkt. Nextcloud dรฆmi: /remote.php/dav/files/<notandanafn>/Backups Synology DSM: / 3. Slรกรฐu inn notandanafn og lykilorรฐ (eรฐa app-sรฉrstakt lykilorรฐ ef รพjรณnninn รพinn krefst รพess).

data.name: WebDav_Preset_IONOSHiDrive_Help
data.value:
IONOS HiDrive โ รรฝsk skรฝgeymsla meรฐ sterkri รกherslu รก persรณnuvernd.
1. Skrรกรฐu รพig inn รก hidrive.ionos.com โ Stillingar โ Forrit og tengd รพjรณnusta โ WebDAV. Eรฐa opnaรฐu WebDAV meรฐ nรบverandi skilrรญkjum รพรญnum beint. 2. Slรกรฐu inn HiDrive notendanafniรฐ รพitt sem notandann. 3. Slรกรฐu inn HiDrive lykilorรฐiรฐ รพitt sem lykilorรฐ. Netfang netรพjรณns, HTTPS, gรกtt og grunnslรณรฐ eru stillt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: WebDav_Preset_Jianguoyun_Help
data.value:
Jianguoyun (ๅๆไบ) โ vinsรฆl kรญnversk skรฝgeymsla meรฐ innfรฆddum WebDAV stuรฐningi.
1. Skrรกรฐu รพig inn รก jianguoyun.com โ Reikningsupplรฝsingar โ รryggi โ Forritastjรณrnun รพriรฐja aรฐila โ Bรฆta viรฐ forriti. Afritaรฐu lykilorรฐ appsins sem bรบiรฐ er til - รพaรฐ er aรฐeins sรฝnt einu sinni. 2. Slรกรฐu inn Jianguoyun netfangiรฐ รพitt sem notandann. 3. Slรกรฐu inn bรบiรฐ til app lykilorรฐ sem lykilorรฐ. Netfang netรพjรณns, HTTPS, gรกtt og grunnslรณรฐ eru stillt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: WebDav_Preset_Koofr_Help
data.value:
Koofr โ persรณnuverndarvรฆn skรฝgeymsla meรฐ aรฐsetur รญ Slรณvenรญu (ESB).
1. Farรฐu รก app.koofr.eu โ Preferences โ Password โ App passwords โ Add password. 2. Slรกรฐu inn Koofr reikningsnetfangiรฐ รพitt sem notandann. 3. Slรกรฐu inn bรบiรฐ til app lykilorรฐ sem lykilorรฐ. Netfang netรพjรณns, HTTPS, gรกtt og grunnslรณรฐ eru stillt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: WebDav_Preset_MailRuCloud_Help
data.value:
Mail.ru Cloud รญ gegnum WebDAV.
1. Farรฐu รก account.mail.ru โ รryggi โ Lykilorรฐ forrita โ Bรบรฐu til lykilorรฐ fyrir forrit. Veldu 'Pรณstur' eรฐa 'Allt' sem gerรฐ og afritaรฐu sรญรฐan lykilorรฐiรฐ sem bรบiรฐ var til. 2. Slรกรฐu inn Mail.ru netfangiรฐ รพitt sem notandi. 3. Slรกรฐu inn lykilorรฐ appsins sem lykilorรฐ. Netfang netรพjรณns, HTTPS, gรกtt og grunnslรณรฐ eru stillt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: WebDav_Preset_Nextcloud_Help
data.value:
Nextcloud โ vinsรฆl sjรกlfhรฝst skrรกarsamstilling og samnรฝting.
1. Slรกรฐu inn Nextcloud netรพjรณninn รพinn (t.d. nextcloud.example.com). 2. Grunnslรณรฐin er forรบtfyllt: /remote.php/dav/files/<notandanafn>/ Skiptu um <notendanafn> meรฐ raunverulegu Nextcloud notendanafninu รพรญnu. 3. Slรกรฐu inn Nextcloud notendanafniรฐ รพitt og lykilorรฐ (eรฐa app lykilorรฐ frรก Stillingar โ รryggi โ Tรฆki og lotur โ Lykilorรฐ forrita).

data.name: WebDav_Preset_ownCloud_Help
data.value:
ownCloud - samstilling og samnรฝting skrรกa sem hรฝst er sjรกlf.
1. Slรกรฐu inn veffang รพitt eigiรฐCloud netรพjรณns (t.d. owncloud.example.com). 2. Grunnslรณรฐin er forรบtfyllt: /remote.php/dav/files/<notandanafn>/ Skiptu um <notendanafn> meรฐ raunverulegu notandanafni รพรญnu eiginCloud. 3. Slรกรฐu inn รพitt eigiรฐCloud notendanafn og lykilorรฐ (eรฐa app lykilorรฐ ef 2FA er virkt).

data.name: WebDav_Preset_pCloud_Help
data.value:
pCloud โ skรฝjageymsla meรฐ gagnaverum รญ ESB og Bandarรญkjunum.
1. Skrรกรฐu รพig inn รก my.pcloud.com โ Stillingar โ รryggi โ Lykilorรฐ forrita โ Bรบa til. Afritaรฐu lykilorรฐ forritsins - รพaรฐ sรฉst aรฐeins einu sinni. 2. Slรกรฐu inn pCloud reikningsnetfangiรฐ รพitt sem notandann. 3. Slรกรฐu inn lykilorรฐ appsins sem lykilorรฐ. Fyrir gagnaver ESB: ewebdav.pcloud.com er notaรฐ sjรกlfkrafa. Fyrir bandarรญskt gagnaver: breyttu hรฝsingaraรฐilanum รญ webdav.pcloud.com.

data.name: WebDav_Preset_YandexDisk_Help
data.value:
Yandex diskur รญ gegnum WebDAV.
1. Farรฐu รก id.yandex.com โ รryggi โ Lykilorรฐ forrita โ Bรบรฐu til lykilorรฐ fyrir forrit fyrir 'WebDAV aรฐgang'. Afritaรฐu lykilorรฐiรฐ sem bรบiรฐ var til - รพaรฐ er aรฐeins sรฝnt einu sinni. 2. Slรกรฐu inn Yandex innskrรกningu รพรญna sem notandi. 3. Slรกรฐu inn lykilorรฐ appsins (ekki lykilorรฐ Yandex reikningsins) sem lykilorรฐ. Netfang netรพjรณns, HTTPS og gรกtt eru stillt sjรกlfkrafa.

data.name: Winget_Description
Winget_ShortDescription
data.value: BUtil bรฝr til stigvaxandi รถryggisafrit, stigvaxandi samstillingu og flytur inn margmiรฐlunarefni รก tรถlvuna รพรญna meรฐ aftvรญtekningu og stuรฐningi viรฐ WebDAV, S3-compatible, NFS, Azure Blob, SFTP, FTPS, SMB/CIFS flutninga fyrir Windows og Linux.
